arts.ttl: Cole Palmer's strange moment in Aston Villa defeat sums up Chelsea's struggles
arts.sum: Cole Palmer spurned a great chance in Chelsea's 2-1 defeat by Aston Villa on Saturday - and his reaction showed his frustration during a rare dry spell for the England star

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Ruben Amorim set for battle with Real Madrid, Liverpool, Chelsea for centre-back
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly in a battle with the likes of Real Madrid, Liverpool and Chelsea for the signature of one of Europe's most in-demand centre-backs.

arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea receive double boost in Liam Delap hunt ahead of summer transfer window?
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea reportedly receive a major double boost in their respective pursuits of Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap.

arts.ttl: European soccer review: Villa's new signings kick Chelsea while they're down
arts.sum: The Premier League title race moved that much closer in Liverpool's favor after Arsenal's loss West Ham United, and Chelsea's backslide away from UEFA Champions League qualification got worse, courtesy of Aston Villa's new January signings. Two months ago, Maresca was trying to keep a lid on expectations and felt forced to play down suggestions his team were in the title race; now he's looking over his shoulder at the likes of Villa, hoping his players can find some form from somewhere.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea ‘ready to bid’ for Liverpool target as Enzo Maresca seeks defensive reinforcements
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly eyeing Loic Bade and are preparing to make a move for the Sevilla defender in the upcoming summer transfer window. The Blues are in urgent need of defensive reinforcements, especially in the centre-back position, with the club not bringing one in during the January transfer window.
